subcodes.title: Kanner
subcodes.first_line:
## Kanner

O Gott, leed mech, hal Deng Hand iwwer mech, maach aus mir eng stralend Luucht an e blénkege Stär. Du bass de
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from AB10053LIT — Opens 'O Gott, leed mech... maach aus mir eng stralend Luucht' = 'Guide me, make me a shining lamp' — different prayer. Correct at lb/14265.
